projects.title: Techno-Economic Analysis and Development of Hylkysaari Island for Smart and Sustainable Tourism
projects.summary: Techno-economic and energy-system study for transforming Hylkysaari Island into a smart, sustainable tourism destination by 2030, comparing BAU, Golden Marguerite and Fireweed scenarios with emphasis on near-zero energy demand, local renewables and waste heat recovery.

projects.title: Techno-economic comparative assessment of residential heating solutions: PV/direct electrification vs district heating
projects.summary: Assessment for BRF Arstaterrassen comparing solar thermal with thermal storage, solar PV with electric boilers and solar PV with heat pumps as seasonal alternatives to district heating.

projects.title: Energy-Environment-Economy analysis of Germany
projects.summary: Energy-sector analysis focused on Germany's greenhouse-neutrality pathway to 2045, including electricity, cost, emissions, renewable integration, storage and nuclear reintroduction scenarios.

projects.title: Bicycle Design Competition (SAE INDIA)
projects.summary: Project team lead for Team TRAMS in Bicycle Design Competition 2020, coordinating design, analysis, documentation and competition deliverables.

projects.title: Automatic Sanitizer Dispenser
projects.summary: Automated hand sanitizer dispenser built by a mechanical engineering student team using e-waste and basic Arduino programming.

projects.title: Wireless Charging Technology and Application in Automobile Industry
projects.summary: Study of wireless charging solutions for portable and automotive environments.

projects.title: Peltier Refrigerator
projects.summary: Compressor-free refrigeration concept based on Peltier cooling with no rotary power-consuming component.

projects.title: Tractor Design Competition 2019
projects.summary: Team member of Team TracToro for Tractor Design Competition 2019.

projects.title: BAJA SAE 2019
projects.summary: Engine and transmission team member for BAJA SAEINDIA 2019.
